name: Diamond Push-Up
execution_steps: Start in a plank with hands together under your chest, index fingers and thumbs forming a diamond.
Brace your core and hold your body in a straight line from head to heels.
Lower your chest toward your hands with the elbows tucked close to your ribs.
Press back up to full elbow extension.
good_when: You want a no-equipment triceps and chest builder.
Training at home or using it as a superset finisher.
bad_when: Your wrists do not tolerate the close, loaded hand position.
You need heavy loading for strength, since bodyweight caps the stimulus.
You want isolated triceps work without chest and shoulder involvement.
